---
name: Bad / dead link report
about: Report a broken, dead, or no-longer-accurate link
title: "[LINK] "
labels: bug, links
---

**Product / file**
Which `links.md` (or `bom.md`) is affected?

**Link**
Paste the broken/outdated link.

**What's wrong**
Dead listing, wrong item, price/availability changed, seller gone, etc.

**Replacement (optional)**
If you know a working alternative, link it here.
